author: y4rr
content: Plan: CIFAR-10 binary batch format: each sample = 1 byte label + 3072 bytes pixels (channel-major: R-plane 32x32, G-plane 32x32, B-plane 32x32). CIFAR-100: 1 byte coarse_label + 1 byte fine_label + 3072 bytes. File names: train: data_batch_1 ... data_batch_5, test: test_batch. CIFAR-100: train.bin, test.bin. Will implement from_dir for Cifar10 and Cifar100, write synthetic 4-image fixture files, add conformance_vision_datasets.rs test.
